chord-bank.name: Chord bank
chord-bank.description: Mutable Instruments' ChordBank — the interval/chord table plus voicing, inversion, and ratio helpers reused by chord-based engines. Linked from the pinned firmware source; a package that declares it may include "plaits/dsp/chords/chord_bank.h" and reuse ChordBank without vendoring a copy.

physical-string.name: Physical string
physical-string.description: Karplus-Strong plucked/bowed string primitives — String (a comb-filtered waveguide) and StringVoice (an excited string with dispersion). Declare it and include "plaits/dsp/physical_modelling/string_voice.h" (or string.h) to build a plucked-string engine without vendoring a copy. delay_line.h is header-only and needs no module.

physical-modal.name: Modal resonator
physical-modal.description: Modal-synthesis primitives — Resonator (a bank of tuned modal filters) and ModalVoice (a mallet-excited resonator). Declare it and include "plaits/dsp/physical_modelling/modal_voice.h" (or resonator.h) to build a struck/modal engine without vendoring a copy.

fm-core.name: FM operator framework
fm-core.description: The 6-operator FM framework — Algorithms (operator-routing opcode tables) and dx_units (DX7 parameter LUTs and conversions), plus the header-only Voice/Patch/Operator/Lfo/Envelope classes. Declare it to build an FM engine that supplies its own patches in code. Note: loading DX7 SYX banks via LoadUserData is not reproducible in community v1 (LoadUserData is a no-op), so build patches programmatically rather than from user data.
